query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS partnerVerifications (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  partnerId INT NOT NULL,
  
  -- 7 verification checkpoints
  licenseVerified TINYINT(1) DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  licenseNumber VARCHAR(100),
  licenseState VARCHAR(10),
  licenseExpiresAt BIGINT,
  licenseDocUrl TEXT,
  licenseVerifiedAt BIGINT,
  licenseVerifiedBy INT,
  licenseNotes TEXT,

  insuranceVerified TINYINT(1) DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  insuranceCarrier VARCHAR(200),
  insurancePolicyNumber VARCHAR(100),
  insuranceExpiresAt BIGINT,
  insuranceDocUrl TEXT,
  insuranceVerifiedAt BIGINT,
  insuranceVerifiedBy INT,
  insuranceNotes TEXT,

  backgroundCheckVerified TINYINT(1) DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  backgroundCheckProvider VARCHAR(100),
  backgroundCheckDate BIGINT,
  backgroundCheckDocUrl TEXT,
  backgroundCheckVerifiedAt BIGINT,
  backgroundCheckVerifiedBy INT,
  backgroundCheckNotes TEXT,

  businessRegistrationVerified TINYINT(1) DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  businessRegistrationDocUrl TEXT,
  businessRegistrationVerifiedAt BIGINT,
  businessRegistrationVerifiedBy INT,
  businessRegistrationNotes TEXT,

  referencesVerified TINYINT(1) DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  referencesCount INT DEFAULT 0,
  referencesNotes TEXT,
  referencesVerifiedAt BIGINT,
  referencesVerifiedBy INT,

  portfolioVerified TINYINT(1) DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  portfolioUrl TEXT,
  portfolioNotes TEXT,
  portfolioVerifiedAt BIGINT,
  portfolioVerifiedBy INT,

  identityVerified TINYINT(1) DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  identityDocType VARCHAR(50),
  identityDocUrl TEXT,
  identityVerifiedAt BIGINT,
  identityVerifiedBy INT,
  identityNotes TEXT,

  -- Aggregate trust score (0-100, computed from checkpoints)
  trustScore INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  
  -- Badge level
  badgeLevel ENUM('none','bronze','silver','gold','platinum') DEFAULT 'none' NOT NULL,
  
  -- Overall status
  overallStatus ENUM('unverified','partial','verified','suspended') DEFAULT 'unverified' NOT NULL,

  createdAt BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT (UNIX_TIMESTAMP() * 1000),
  updatedAt BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT (UNIX_TIMESTAMP() * 1000) ON UPDATE (UNIX_TIMESTAMP() * 1000),

  UNIQUE KEY uq_partner (partnerId)
);
